privileged_info_summary: The navigate_to_notifications task is a UI navigation task running on a synthetic Android AVD emulator using the real Flight Crew View app (com.robert.fcView). The app is a legitimate, publicly available aviation crew management application developed by Flight Crew Apps, LLC, with over 40,000 active crews using it. The app does support Friend/Family accounts and includes a Notifications feature accessible via the menu. The task uses a synthetic test account (cuasuite@gmail.com) created specifically for this benchmark environment. No real personal data or privileged information is involved; the task is purely about demonstrating UI navigation capabilities.
